title: China's Rare Earth Grip Holds Despite Trump-Xi Talks
description: China's rare earth export controls continue to bite, with yttrium, dysprosium and terbium shipments far below historical norms despite Trump's Beijing summit.

title: Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management Co. Has $3.61 Million Holdings in MP Materials Corp. $MP
description: Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management Co. cut its stake in MP Materials Corp. title: MP Materials (MP) Is Up 5.2% After Beating Q1 Estimates Amid Shifting China Supply Dynamics
description:
In recent days, MP Materials reported first-quarter 2026 results that exceeded earnings and revenue expectations while highlighting progress on magnet production, heavy rare earth separations, and recycling initiatives underpinned by long-term contracts with Apple and the U.S. Department of Defense. 
At the same time, insider share sales, cooling commodity prices, and signs of looser Chinese export restrictions on rare earths have injected fresh uncertainty into how investors assess the...

title: China Against Everybody: The New Geopolitics of Rare Earth Elements
description: The most quotable framing of America’s rare earth predicament this year came from outside the rare earth industry itself. Speaking with Bloomberg Businessweek on May 22, 2026, REalloys CEO Lipi Sternheim reduced geopolitics to a single line: “It used to be oil and OPEC. It’s now, OPEC includes many countries, so there are checks and ... China Against Everybody: The New Geopolitics of Rare Earth Elements
